description: A baseball magazine that focuses on batting tips.  There are lots of colorful, full-page photos of skilled athletes demonstrating proper form and technique.

An informative guide to self-defense using clubs and batons.  Aimed at the law enforcement and military market, it is packed with time tested, no-nonsense information and written to be understandable for beginners.

name.str: TC 7-21.1 (CUI) Special Forces Blunt Weapon Techniques

description: A large military manual describing advanced techniques and practices for all manner of blunt weapons, from batons and quarterstaffs to makeshift clubs and large rocks. Requires some experience to understand.
